pi_items.source: Sygic GPS Navigation documentation - View & Units settings section (https://www.manula.com/manuals/sygic/sygic-gps-navigation/1/en/topic/view-amp-units and https://www.manula.com/manuals/sygic/sygic-gps-navigation-for-android-2-0/1/en/topic/view-amp-units)

Sygic GPS Navigation documentation and SDK documentation (https://www.sygic.com/developers/professional-navigation-sdk/android/map/) confirm that the Buildings setting can be toggled between enabled and disabled states

privileged_info_summary: The task requires disabling 3D buildings in Sygic GPS Navigation (com.sygic.aura). The setting is verified to exist and is called 'Buildings' in the View & Units menu. The setting can be turned OFF to disable the display of 3D buildings on the map. This is a documented feature of the real Sygic GPS Navigation application, not synthetic data. The APK is obtained from the official Google Play Store.
